summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WhatsApp Business automation SaaS. Backend APIs working correctly, complete onboarding flow (1→2→3→4) functions with smooth transitions, Step 2 phone input layout verified as working correctly with country code dropdown and phone input side by side. Landing page, login/signup toggle, route protection, and dark theme consistency all working. Issue identified with final onboarding submission not completing account creation properly.

minor_issues.issue: AI chat returns fallback error message instead of actual AI response
minor_issues.impact: LLM integration may have connectivity issues but API structure works

critical_bugs.issue: Launch My Bot button completes onboarding flow but fails final account creation/login
critical_bugs.flow: After completing all 4 onboarding steps, clicking 'Launch My Bot' redirects to login with 'Invalid login credentials' instead of dashboard

passed_tests: Backend /api/chat accepts POST requests with proper error handling
Landing page loads with hero section, stats, pricing, and proper branding
Login page toggle between login and signup works correctly
Dashboard route protection redirects to /login correctly
Complete onboarding flow Step 1→2→3→4 with smooth transitions
Step 2 critical layout: Country code dropdown (+237) and phone input positioned side by side and functional
All onboarding form validations and step progressions working
Dark theme consistency across all pages (landing, login, onboarding)
Onboarding review summary displays collected data correctly

success_percentage.frontend: 90% (9/10 major features passed, 1 critical bug in final submission)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix onboarding final submission issue: After completing all 4 steps, the 'Launch My Bot' button should successfully create the client record and redirect to dashboard instead of showing 'Invalid login credentials'. The auth flow handles rate limits gracefully but the final database insertion or authentication step is failing. Also investigate LLM integration connectivity for chat endpoint.
